# MTP Group Fulfillment

## Company
MTP Group is a 3PL fulfillment operator in Ukraine with 10+ years of experience, 3,900 m² warehouse near Kyiv, 150+ active clients, and 60,000+ shipments per month.

## Services
- E-commerce fulfillment (receiving, storage, packing, shipping) from 18 UAH/order
- Pallet storage from 450 UAH/pallet/month
- Marketplace integration (Rozetka, Prom.ua, Kasta, OLX)
- WMS system, CRM integration
- 3 backup generators + Starlink (operates during blackouts)

## Pricing
- Shipping: from 18 UAH/order (200+ orders/day)
- Storage: from 650 UAH/m³/month
- Minimum: 5,000 UAH/month

## Location
Two warehouses in Kyiv region (Shchaslyve village, Boryspil district + Bilohorodka)

## Contact
- Website: https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua
- Phone: +380501444645
- Telegram: @nikolay_mtp
- Email: mtpgrouppromo@gmail.com

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2016
- Warehouse: 3,900 m² (Category B+)
- Clients: 150+
- Monthly shipments: 60,000+
- Operates 24/7 including during power outages
- No long-term contracts required
- Trial period available
